description.ko: 지구 표면의 질감을 탐구하며, 소금 평원에서 자연적으로 형성된 복잡한 소금 결정과 광물 퇴적물을 추상화처럼 포착한 작품입니다.
description.en: A stunning exploration of Earth's surface textures, focusing on the intricate salt crusts and mineral deposits that form naturally in salt flats, resembling an abstract painting of nature.

prompt: Macro satellite photography of the Great Salt Lake textures, showing crystalline salt crusts, teal water veins, and cracked earth patterns, high contrast, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic geological details.
